description: Open a URL in the device's default browser or app.
name: open_url

description: Open the phone dialer with a pre-filled number. The user must confirm to dial.
name: make_call

description: Open the SMS app with a pre-filled recipient and optional message body.
name: send_sms

phone_number.description: Phone number to send SMS to

description: Read the current text content from the device clipboard.
name: get_clipboard

description: Copy text to the device clipboard.
name: set_clipboard

description: Get device hardware and OS information (brand, model, OS version, etc.).
name: get_device_info

description: Get the device's current GPS location (latitude, longitude, altitude, accuracy). Requests location permission if not yet granted.
name: get_location

description: Send a local notification to the device. Requests notification permission if not yet granted.
name: send_notification

description: Search or list contacts from the device address book. Requests contacts permission if not yet granted.
name: get_contacts

limit.description: Maximum number of contacts to return (default 20)

query.description: Search keyword to filter contacts by name (optional)

description: Create a new event in the device calendar. Requests calendar permission if not yet granted.
name: create_calendar_event

description: List events from the device calendar within a date range. Requests calendar permission if not yet granted.
name: list_calendar_events

description: Open the device camera to take a photo. Returns the saved photo path in the sandbox.
name: take_photo

description: Access the device media library with explicit user or host authorization. Use status to inspect permission, search to list authorized media metadata, import to copy selected assets into sandbox artifacts, or pick as a manual picker fallback.
name: media_library

asset_ids.description: Asset identifiers returned by search to import.

end_ms.description: Optional exclusive creation timestamp upper bound in Unix milliseconds.

limit.description: Maximum number of media items. Default 20 for search/import and 9 for pick. Max 50.

media_types.description: Optional media types to include. Defaults to images.

request_permission.description: Whether the host may show a system permission prompt if needed. Default true for search/import.

start_ms.description: Optional inclusive creation timestamp lower bound in Unix milliseconds.

description: Record audio from the device microphone for a specified duration. Requests microphone permission if not yet granted.
name: record_audio

description: Schedule an alarm notification at a specified time. Uses the device notification system.
name: set_alarm

repeat_days.description: Optional weekdays for a repeating alarm. Omit for a one-time alarm. Use lowercase weekday names such as monday, tuesday, or all seven days for daily.

time.description: Alarm time in HH:mm format (e.g. "07:30") or ISO 8601

description: Install an Android APK from a sandbox or local file path. If installing unknown apps is not allowed yet, opens the Android permission screen first. The user must confirm the installation in the system package installer.
name: install_apk

apk_path.description: APK file path. Prefer sandbox paths such as /workspace/app.apk; absolute local paths are also accepted.
